title: Claude 4.6 Opus
summary: Anthropic's flagship now handles massive documents with full GA on 1M context + 128K output. Lowkey the context king rn with agentic capabilities that actually work.
takeaway: 1M context window at standard pricing, finally

title: Windsurf
summary: Fr the most complete agentic dev experience. Arena Mode lets you compare models side-by-side, Plan Mode handles smarter task planning before code gen.
takeaway: The first agentic IDE that actually ships

title: Meta Vibes AI Editor
summary: Quietly launched as a full editor now. Image & video generation, timeline editing, production tools—it's like Google Flow but tbh the output quality still needs work.
takeaway: Standalone creation studio for video & image gen
